button.label: Link Manager
button.supertip: Show/hide the Link Manager: every linked object, its Excel source, and status.

button.label: Refresh All
button.supertip: Re-render every linked object in this document from its Excel source.

button.label: Format Table
button.supertip: Brand the table the cursor is in: green header, fonts, borders.

button.label: Brand Font
button.supertip: Apply the brand font to the selected text.
